briefdescription.para: This function writes a buffer of bytes to the IIC serial EEPROM.

parameterdescription.para: contains the address of the data to write.
contains the number of bytes in the buffer to be written. Note that this should not exceed the page size of the EEPROM as noted by the constant PAGE_SIZE.

simplesect.para: The number of bytes written, a value less than that which was specified as an input indicates an error.

briefdescription.para: Main function to initialize interop system and read data from AR0330 sensor.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if MIPI Interop was successful.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
X.XX XX YY/MM/DD 1.00 RHe 19/09/20 Initial release.
